problem id: 835aca57
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHR(7)

examples:
  10111001 -> 00000001
  10001010 -> 00000001
  10010100 -> 00000000
  11110010 -> 00000000
  00010001 -> 00000000
  11010111 -> 00000000
  00001100 -> 00000000
  01110000 -> 00000000

query: 01010000
predicted answer: 00000000
